Gas (95) price in [BKK](http://www.shell.com/home/thailand-th/html/iwgen/shell_for_motorists/price_board/app_thailand-th_petrolpricing.html): 29.59 baht/litre

Gas (Premium) price in [San Francisco](http://www.sanfrangasprices.com/index.aspx?fuel=C) : $4.53/gallon (max) -- approx. 39.90 baht/litre!!!

Okay, I'll stop complaining. --"
